name: South of the Border Eggplant
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Eggplant, peeled and cut into 1/2-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep, 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole, cook bacon covered with paper toweling for 4 minutes or until crisp. Reserve the bacon fat.
2. Remove the cooked bacon and set it aside.
3. Add the ground beef, onion, garlic, and green pepper to the reserved bacon fat. Cook, uncovered, for 6 1/2 minutes or until the vegetables are tender and the beef is browned.
4. Add the eggplant, salt, pepper, tomato sauce, feta cheese, and reserved bacon to the mixture. Stir to blend all ingredients together.
5. Cover and heat in a Microwave Oven for 8 minutes or until the eggplant is tender.
6. Sprinkle with croutons and cover again. Heat uncovered for an additional 1 minute or until heated through.
